case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NORMAN ALEXANDER MORAN CRUZ

LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,180.27 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, NORMAN ALEXANDER MORAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
